response.overview: Hyoga arrives in Bluegrad and confronts the Blue Warriors and their leader, Alexer, who seeks to expand his dominion southward. Amidst a frigid family conflict, this fan-made short film by Hakuren adapts this previously unreleased episode inspired by the middle chapter of Masami Kurumada's original manga, set between the Sanctuary and Poseidon arcs, exploring the fate of the inhabitants of the frozen city.
response.title: Saint Seiya: The Cygnus Story

titles.title: Saint Seiya-Historia del Cisne: Natassia del reino helado
聖闘士星矢 短篇 The Cygnus Story 氷の国のナターシャ
